data.name: 69 Seconds Later
data.detailed_description:
Survive the Horniest Apocalypse Ever!

Discover 69 Seconds Later, the kinkiest, most depraved adult game you’ll ever play!

In a post-apocalyptic wasteland overrun by sex-crazed zombies, you’ll fuck your way to salvation in a thrilling blend of high-octane horror, gut-busting humor, and hardcore erotica. This isn’t just a zombie game—it’s a full-on, NSFW fever dream where survival means getting down and dirty.

Experience a gripping narrative through stunning, high-quality comics that set the stage for each pulse-pounding encounter like never before with this new comic-style.

Follow Zoe “Snark” Carter and her boyfriend Ethan as they navigate a ruined world, from the orgy-gone-wrong at Lust Lodge to the climactic showdown in Fuckocalypse Plaza.

Every scene drips with dark humor, visceral terror, and steamy tension, leading to interactive sex that’ll leave you breathless. Will you save humanity by screwing the undead back to sanity? Only one way to find out!

Get ready for explicit, interactive sex scenes that push all the right buttons. Choose from a variety of poses, some exclusive to each location. Spank, grab hips, guide heads, make those boobs jiggle, or dive into blowjobs, threesomes, and gag-heavy action. Every thrust and moan fills the Intensity Meter, max it out to unlock a range of explosive moneyshot finishers, letting you choose how to seal the deal. It’s raw, it’s raunchy, and it’s ridiculously hot.

  • High-Quality Comics: Immersive story panels with high quality renders, setting up each steamy encounter.

  • Interactive Sex: Multiple poses per scene, including exclusive bondage styles (ropes, chains, medical straps).

  • Kinky Actions: Spanking, blowjobs, boob jiggling, grabbing hips/heads, threesomes, and gags.

  • Intensity Meter: Build pleasure to unlock customizable moneyshot finishers.

  • Humor and Horror: A wild mix of dark comedy, zombie terror, and unapologetic erotica.

  • Locations: From Lust Lodge’s orgy chaos to Bone Yard Clinic’s morgue threesome, every setting is a kinky playground.

  • Anyone can dive in: Use your mouse, VR controllers to interact with the characters. 

Are You Ready to Fuck the Apocalypse?

Grab your antidote gel, brace for the horde, and dive into 69 Seconds Later. Humanity’s fate, and your wildest fantasies, await!

data.short_description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland overrun by sex-crazed zombies, you’ll fuck your way to salvation in a thrilling blend of high-octane horror, gut-busting humor, and PORN. Grab your antidote gel, brace for the horde, and dive into 69 Seconds Later.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • Processor: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • VR Support: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • VR Support: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
